segment.source: Renders an optional small uppercase heading above a horizontal row of outlined badges, each showing a check-circle icon plus a text label with an optional link; alignment is left, center or right. Use it for: lists of certification and standard names — ISO 27001, SOC 2, GDPR compliant, TÜV — near footers, checkouts or forms. Labels are text only; prefer 'Certifications' or 'Trust Badges' when logo images and descriptions are available.
